meaning: 蒙河[泰国东部](湄公河的最大支流)
examples: He mun come back—that he mun.
He mun come home—he mun come home.
Thy father mun come back to thee—he mun!
Chang-wook has a date with his girlfriend, Mun-suk, and the writer-director persuades him to bring her along for the ride.
The chef often shares the cultural and historical context of the dishes she serves, as do Mun, Perlman and Felix.
